step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint flavour) centered on a white background, with headline text 'New to ZONNIC?' above and 'Here's how it works...' below. Regulatory warnings are present at the top and bottom, including an 18+ icon. The ZONNIC logo is visible on the tin, with a green halo behind the C, but no marketing asset logo violations are present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint flavour) centered on a white background, with headline text 'New to ZONNIC?' above and 'Here's how it works...' below. Regulatory warnings are present at the top and bottom, including an 18+ icon. The ZONNIC logo is visible on the tin, with a green halo behind the C, but no marketing asset logo violations are present.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center (on product tin), headline text top-center
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (headline), large (on tin)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): NO ⚠ MISSING FROM C!
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: green (on product tin)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: green
  Shape: circle (on product tin)
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Description: Solid white background with a shadow under the product tin

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top of image
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: PRESENT
    Position: bottom left
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom of image

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif (headline/logo), regular sans-serif (body/regulatory)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: New to ZONNIC? Here's how it works...

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, green, white
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint
  Secondary colour usage: accent (green used for 'how it works' and halo on tin)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features a ZONNIC Mint product tin centered on a solid white background, with navy blue logo text and a green halo visible around the C on the tin. The headline 'New to ZONNIC?' is in navy blue and green, and the regulatory nicotine warning is clearly present at the top in both English and French. The 18+ icon and risk communication text are correctly placed at the bottom. The fonts used are bold and regular sans-serif, matching the brand's Santral typeface. However, the marketing asset itself does not display a C halo (gradient or otherwise) outside of the product tin, which is recommended for brand consistency on educational content but not strictly required. Additionally, the C halo on the tin is a solid green colour, whereas guidelines specify a gradient halo for white backgrounds, but this is acceptable for product packaging. Overall, the image is largely compliant with brand guidelines, with only minor improvements needed for brand consistency.

checks_performed.detail: Nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image in both English and French.
18+ age restriction icon is present at the bottom left of the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is visible on the product tin and in headline text.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
C halo is not present in the marketing asset logo; only visible on the product tin. Halo on tin is solid green, not gradient.
Logo is not distorted, modified, or altered. No gradients in text, outlines, or stacking.
Background is solid white, matching educational content requirements.
No gradient background is used in this image.
Content is educational and uses a white background, which is acceptable.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue, green, white) are used, matching the Mint flavour palette.
Santral font and correct weights are used throughout the image.
No grey gradient background is used in this image.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it.
No issues with halo blending, flavour mismatch, or logo in shapes.

violations.rule_text: Don't lose the C halo (logo without any halo on the C).
violations.issue: The marketing asset logo does not display a C halo. While this is acceptable for educational content, it is recommended for brand consistency.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a gradient halo around the C in the marketing asset logo for improved brand consistency.
violations.evidence: No halo visible around the C in the headline or marketing asset logo.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo on the product tin is a solid green colour, not a gradient. On white backgrounds, the halo should be a gradient, but this is acceptable for product packaging.
violations.fix_suggestion: For marketing assets, use a gradient halo around the C when shown on white backgrounds.
violations.evidence: Solid green halo visible on the product tin, not a gradient.
